finding_results.notes: Recast all four cited follow-up lines into Noor-anchored sensory or behavioral beats. The delivery note now lands through the warm printer strip and the polite sentence beside the hazard label; the warning-sheet beat now resolves through Noor's visual scan of the bottles and gloves; Marcus's lockout now resolves through Noor's memory of his earlier unimpeded access against the dead handle; the vent reroute now resolves through the group's physical turn from the taped door to the vent and the smell moving ahead of them.

summary: Removed the chapter's packet-cited abstract thesis closures and replaced them with concrete, close-third perception so the four beats remain legible without narrator-level explanation of Ember's strategy.
